e.p: Hi! What's your name?
e.m: Chào lại và giới thiệu tên của bạn bằng [Your Name], kèm theo một câu về cảm xúc khi gặp người đó.
e.h: I am/I'm + [Your Name]. + One sentence with because/although.
e.s: Hello! I'm [Your Name]. I'm happy to meet you because I enjoy making new friends. Although I'm a bit shy at first, I usually open up after a short chat. I hope we can talk more when you have time.

e.p: Nice to meet you. How are you today?
e.m: Trả lời trạng thái hiện tại của bạn, nói thêm lý do và một đề nghị ngắn để tiếp tục trò chuyện.
e.h: I am + adj + because + clause; So/Let's + V-inf.
e.s: Nice to meet you too. I'm feeling good today because I finished an important project this morning. However, I'm a little tired from traveling, so I plan to rest later. If you want, we can grab a coffee after work.

e.p: Where are you from?
e.m: Nói nơi bạn đến, thêm thông tin về nơi đó và một so sánh ngắn với nơi người hỏi.
e.h: I'm from + place; which + relative clause; more/less + than.
e.s: I'm from a small town near the coast which has beautiful beaches. I think it's more peaceful than the city where I live now. Although the town is quiet, it has great food and friendly people. I prefer it for weekends because it helps me relax.

e.p: Do you live nearby?
e.m: Trả lời có/không, cho biết khoảng cách và nói khi nào bạn thường gặp người đó hoặc tới địa điểm gần đó.
e.h: Yes/No + I live/shop/study + near/far + place; When + clause.
e.s: Yes, I live quite close to here, about a ten-minute walk which is very convenient. When I have meetings nearby, I usually walk so I can clear my mind. Although it's a short distance, I sometimes drive if the weather is bad. I think living nearby is better for spontaneity.

e.p: Would you like to exchange contact details?
e.m: Đồng ý hoặc từ chối lịch sự, nêu lý do và đề xuất một phương án liên lạc khác nếu cần.
e.h: I'd like to/ I'd prefer not to + because + clause; However/So + suggestion.
e.s: I'd like to exchange contacts because it's useful to stay in touch. However, I prefer messaging first to arrange a meeting. If you agree, we can share phone numbers or connect on social media. That way it's easier to plan when both of us are free.

e.p: Can you tell me your name and age?
e.m: Giới thiệu tên bằng [Your Name] và tuổi của bạn, thêm một câu ngắn về cảm nghĩ khi ở độ tuổi đó.
e.h: I am/I'm + [Your Name]. I am + age + years old; Because/When + clause.
e.s: My name is [Your Name]. I am 25 years old and I feel at a good point in my life because I can balance work and hobbies. When I was younger, I wanted to travel more, but now I appreciate stability. I think this age is better for making long-term plans.

e.p: How old are you? Do you have any plans for your birthday?
e.m: Nêu tuổi, mô tả một kế hoạch đơn giản cho sinh nhật và lý do bạn chọn như vậy.
e.h: I am + age; I'm planning to + V-inf because + reason.
e.s: I'm 28 years old and I'm planning to have a small dinner with close friends because I prefer intimate gatherings. Although big parties are fun, they can be tiring. If the weather is nice, we will go for a short trip nearby. I think celebrating quietly suits me more than a big event.

e.p: Do you think age affects your choices?
e.m: Nêu quan điểm cá nhân về ảnh hưởng của tuổi tác, đưa ví dụ và lý do cụ thể.
e.h: I believe/think + clause; For example + clause; so + result.
e.s: I believe age does affect choices because priorities change over time. For example, people who are older may prefer stability and family commitments more than travel. When I reached my late twenties, I noticed I value work-life balance more. Therefore I make decisions that support long-term goals.

e.p: Were you different when you were younger?
e.m: So sánh bản thân hiện tại và quá khứ, dùng cấu trúc so sánh (more ... than / better).
e.h: I was + adj, but now I am + adj; more/less + than.
e.s: I was more outgoing when I was younger, but now I'm calmer and more selective with my time. I travel less than before, which might be because I have more responsibilities. Although I seem quieter, I feel it's better for my focus and productivity. I prefer this balance more than constant busyness.

e.p: Do you introduce yourself differently in formal and informal situations?
e.m: Giải thích cách bạn tự giới thiệu trong tình huống trang trọng và thân mật, nêu lý do và ví dụ ngắn.
e.h: In formal situations I + V; In informal situations I + V; because + reason.
e.s: In formal situations I usually say my full name and job title because it's professional and clear. In informal settings I use my nickname and share hobbies so people can relate to me more easily. When I meet colleagues, I explain my role which helps teamwork. Although the content differs, the goal is always to make a good first impression.

e.p: Are you feeling well today?
e.m: Trả lời tình trạng sức khỏe của bạn, nêu lý do và đề xuất cách xử lý nếu không khỏe.
e.h: I feel + adj + because + clause; If + clause, I will + V-inf.
e.s: I'm feeling fine today because I slept well last night. However, I felt a bit under the weather yesterday so I rested and drank tea. If I feel worse later, I will see a doctor. I think taking small breaks helps me recover faster.

e.p: Have you been exercising recently?
e.m: Nói về thói quen tập luyện hiện tại, lợi ích bạn thấy và một so sánh ngắn với quá khứ.
e.h: I have been + V-ing; It helps me + V; more/less + than before.
e.s: I have been exercising three times a week which helps me stay energetic. When I exercised regularly, I slept better and felt less stressed. Although I used to train more intensively, I now prefer moderate workouts which suit my schedule better. I think regular exercise is more important than intensity.

e.p: Do you have any allergies or special diets?
e.m: Trả lời về dị ứng hoặc chế độ ăn, giải thích lý do nếu có và cách bạn quản lý.
e.h: I am allergic to + noun / I follow a + diet; so I + V; which + relative clause.
e.s: I am allergic to shellfish, so I always check menus carefully when I eat out. This restriction may seem limiting, but it keeps me healthy. When I travel, I carry a note which explains my allergy in the local language. That way I can enjoy meals without worry.

e.p: What do you do to stay healthy when you are busy?
e.m: Mô tả 2–3 biện pháp bạn làm để giữ sức khỏe khi bận rộn và lý do tại sao chúng hiệu quả.
e.h: I + V (habit) + because + reason; When + clause; Although/However + contrast.
e.s: I try to keep a balanced diet and take short walks during breaks because it boosts my energy. When work is intense, I schedule short rest periods which help me avoid burnout. Although these habits seem small, they make a big difference in my productivity. I believe consistency is more effective than occasional big efforts.

e.p: Would you see a doctor if symptoms persist?
e.m: Trả lời điều kiện bạn đi khám và nêu một tình huống cụ thể làm bạn quyết định đi khám.
e.h: If + symptoms + persist, I will + V; For example + clause.
e.s: If symptoms persist for more than a week, I will see a doctor because I don't want problems to get worse. For example, if a cough doesn't improve and affects my sleep, I'll book an appointment. Although I sometimes wait to see if it gets better, persistent issues make me act. Health is important, so I prefer to be cautious.

e.p: Long time no see! What have you been up to?
e.m: Trả lời ngắn về hoạt động chính thời gian gần đây và cảm xúc khi gặp lại họ.
e.h: I've been + V-ing; I feel + adj + because + clause.
e.s: I've been busy working on a new project which takes most of my time. I'm glad to see you because catching up helps me relax. When I'm free, I try to meet friends regularly to maintain relationships. Although work is demanding, I value these moments more than ever.

e.p: Do you want to catch up over coffee this weekend?
e.m: Đồng ý hoặc đề xuất phương án khác, nêu lý do và thời gian phù hợp cho bạn.
e.h: I'd love to/ I'd prefer to + V; because + reason; When + time clause.
e.s: I'd love to catch up over coffee because it's a relaxed way to talk. However, I have a meeting on Saturday morning, so late afternoon would be better for me. If that works for you, let's meet at the café near the park. I think it's a nicer place than noisy ones downtown.

e.p: Who else will join us?
e.m: Liệt kê những người sẽ tham gia, kèm thông tin ngắn về họ và mối quan hệ.
e.h: So-and-so + who + relative clause; and + so on.
e.s: Anna, who is my college friend, will probably join us and Mark, who works with me, might come too. Anna is outgoing while Mark is more reserved, which balances the conversation. When we meet, we usually share recent news and plan small trips. I think meeting both of them makes the gathering more enjoyable.

e.p: Can we make it a small group? I prefer quieter places.
e.m: Trả lời về sở thích của bạn, nêu quan điểm cá nhân và đề xuất cụ thể.
e.h: I prefer + noun/adjective + because + reason; So/Therefore + suggestion.
e.s: I prefer small groups because quieter places let us talk comfortably. Therefore, I suggest meeting at a quiet café that has a terrace. Although big groups can be fun, I think this meeting will be more meaningful with fewer people. If you'd like, we can invite one more friend at most.

e.p: I'm sorry I'm late.
e.m: Chấp nhận lời xin lỗi hoặc nói rõ cảm xúc, nêu lý do nếu cần và kết thúc bằng một đề nghị tích cực.
e.h: That's/No problem + because + clause; However/Next time + suggestion.
e.s: No problem, I understand that traffic can be unpredictable. However, please try to let me know next time if you're running late. When you informed me earlier, it helped me manage my time better. I appreciate you coming and let's start when you're ready.

e.p: Thank you for helping me yesterday.
e.m: Phản ứng với lời cảm ơn, bày tỏ khiêm tốn và nêu lý do bạn sẵn lòng giúp.
e.h: You're welcome; I was happy to + V because + reason; It was my pleasure.
e.s: You're welcome, I was happy to help because I know how stressful deadlines can be. It was my pleasure to assist, and I'm glad it made a difference. If you need more help, let me know and I'll try my best. I think teamwork is more effective than working alone.

e.p: Sorry, I forgot to bring the documents.
e.m: Xin lỗi nhẹ nhàng hoặc nhận lỗi, đề xuất giải pháp và nêu điều kiện để giải quyết vấn đề.
e.h: I understand + but/so + suggestion; If + clause, we can + V-inf.
e.s: I understand mistakes happen, but we need the documents for the meeting. If you can send them by email now, we can still review them before noon. Although it's inconvenient, this solution should work for everyone. I appreciate your effort to fix it quickly.

e.p: Thanks for being patient while I explained.
e.m: Trả lời tỏ vẻ thông cảm, nêu lý do bạn kiên nhẫn và kết luận tích cực.
e.h: It's okay; I was patient because + reason; So + result.
e.s: It's okay, I was patient because clear communication prevents mistakes later. When someone explains carefully, I feel more confident about the task. So taking time to understand each other is worth it. I hope we both feel comfortable moving forward.

e.p: I owe you one for covering my shift.
e.m: Phản hồi lịch sự, từ chối nhận ơn quá, và đề nghị trả lại hành động tốt khi cần.
e.h: You don't have to/I don't mind; If + you need, I will + V-inf; because + reason.
e.s: You don't have to worry about it; I was glad to help because team support matters to me. If you need a favor later, I will be happy to return it. Although I appreciate the offer, mutual help is part of teamwork. I think that's how good teams work.

e.p: What do you do for a living?
e.m: Nói nghề nghiệp của bạn, mô tả ngắn nhiệm vụ chính và lý do bạn chọn nghề này.
e.h: I work as a + job; I mainly + V; because + reason.
e.s: I work as a project manager and I mainly coordinate teams and timelines. I chose this career because I enjoy organizing work and helping others achieve goals. When projects succeed, it's very rewarding for me. Although the role can be stressful, I prefer it to a routine desk job.

e.p: Do you enjoy your job?
e.m: Nêu quan điểm cá nhân về công việc, đưa lý do và một ví dụ cụ thể.
e.h: I enjoy + V-ing because + reason; For example + clause; so + result.
e.s: I enjoy my job because it allows me to solve problems and learn new skills. For example, last month I led a challenging project which improved my leadership. When the team works well, results are satisfying, so I stay motivated. I think meaningful work matters more than salary alone.

e.p: How do you handle tight deadlines?
e.m: Mô tả chiến lược của bạn khi đối mặt với hạn chót khẩn, nêu ưu tiên và kết quả mong muốn.
e.h: I prioritize + noun; I delegate + tasks; If + problem, I will + V-inf.
e.s: I prioritize tasks that have the biggest impact and delegate others to teammates. If a problem arises, I communicate quickly and adjust the plan. Although tight deadlines are stressful, clear priorities help us finish on time. I believe good planning is better than last-minute rushing.

e.p: Would you rather work alone or in a team?
e.m: Nêu sở thích của bạn giữa làm độc lập và làm nhóm, giải thích lý do, dùng so sánh (better/more ... than).
e.h: I prefer + V-ing + because + reason; It's better/more + adj + than + noun.
e.s: I prefer working in a team because collaboration brings diverse ideas which improve results. It's more effective than working alone for complex projects. When tasks require deep focus, I enjoy solo work, but overall teamwork leads to better solutions. I find balance between both approaches is ideal.

e.p: Are you open to learning new skills at work?
e.m: Trả lời sẵn sàng hoặc không, nêu ví dụ kỹ năng bạn muốn học và điều kiện để bạn học.
e.h: I'm open to + V-ing; I want to learn + skill because + reason; If + time, I will + V-inf.
e.s: I'm open to learning new skills because continuous growth is important in my field. I want to learn data analysis which will help me make better decisions. If I have time next quarter, I will take an online course. Although learning requires effort, the long-term benefits are worth it.

e.p: How many people are in your family?
e.m: Trả lời số thành viên, mô tả ngắn về một người và mối quan hệ với họ.
e.h: There are + number + people in my family; + who + relative clause.
e.s: There are five people in my family, including my parents and two siblings. My sister, who studies abroad, is very independent and inspiring. When we gather, we share meals and stories which bring us closer. I think family support is more important than material things.

e.p: Do you live with your family?
e.m: Cho biết bạn có sống cùng gia đình không, nêu lợi ích và một bất lợi ngắn nếu có.
e.h: Yes/No + I live with + family member; It is + advantage + but/although + disadvantage.
e.s: No, I live alone in the city for work, which gives me independence and quiet space. However, I miss family meals and regular face-to-face conversations. When I visit them, we cook together and catch up on news. I prefer living independently now but value family time highly.

e.p: What activities do you do together as a family?
e.m: Mô tả 2 hoạt động gia đình, nêu lý do bạn thích những hoạt động đó.
e.h: We usually + V (activity) and + V; because + reason; which + relative clause.
e.s: We usually cook and go for short trips together because these activities let us relax and connect. My parents enjoy cooking traditional dishes which everyone loves. When we travel, we create memories that strengthen our bond. Although busy schedules make it hard, we try to meet when possible.

e.p: Is family more important than career for you?
e.m: Nêu quan điểm cá nhân về ưu tiên giữa gia đình và sự nghiệp, giải thích lý do và ví dụ.
e.h: I believe + clause; because + reason; For example + clause; so + conclusion.
e.s: I believe family and career both matter, but family often takes priority in important decisions because relationships are long-term. For example, I chose a job closer to home when my parents needed support. Although career growth is important, I think work should fit around family needs sometimes. So I try to balance both responsibly.

e.p: Do any family members influence your hobbies or choices?
e.m: Nói về một người trong gia đình đã ảnh hưởng đến sở thích hoặc quyết định của bạn và nêu lý do.
e.h: My + family member + who + relative clause + influenced me to + V; because + reason.
e.s: My mother, who loves gardening, influenced me to enjoy plants and outdoor activities. Because of her, I spend weekends tending a small garden which relaxes me. When I feel stressed, gardening helps me think clearly and recharge. I think her example taught me patience and appreciation for simple things.

e.p: What do you like to do in your free time?
e.m: Mô tả 2–3 sở thích của bạn và lý do bạn thích chúng.
e.h: I like + V-ing; because + reason; When + clause.
e.s: I like reading and cycling in my free time because they help me relax and stay healthy. When I read, I learn new perspectives which inspire me at work. Cycling is refreshing and is better for both body and mind than sitting indoors all day. Although I enjoy both, I prefer reading when the weather is bad.

e.p: Do you prefer indoor or outdoor hobbies?
e.m: Nêu ưu tiên của bạn giữa trong nhà và ngoài trời, so sánh và đưa ví dụ.
e.h: I prefer + indoor/outdoor + because + reason; more/less + than + noun.
e.s: I prefer outdoor hobbies because I like fresh air and movement more than staying indoors. For example, hiking lets me disconnect from screens and think clearly. Although indoor hobbies like cooking are enjoyable, outdoor activities make me feel more energetic. I find them more fulfilling than sedentary pastimes.

e.p: How often do you practice your hobby?
e.m: Nêu tần suất và thói quen, giải thích điều kiện khiến bạn thay đổi tần suất.
e.h: I usually + V (frequency); If + busy, I + V less/often; When + free, I + V more.
e.s: I usually practice my hobby three times a week, but if I'm very busy I do it less frequently. When I have free weekends, I spend more time on it because it recharges me. Although consistency is hard sometimes, I try to keep a routine. I believe regular practice improves skills more than occasional effort.

e.p: Have you ever tried a hobby that surprised you?
e.m: Kể về một sở thích mới bạn đã thử, cảm nhận của bạn và liệu bạn có tiếp tục hay không.
e.h: I tried + noun/activity + which + relative clause; I found it + adj; so I + will/won't + V-inf.
e.s: I tried pottery last year, which was more challenging than I expected. I found it calming and creative, so I continued taking classes for a few months. Although it required patience, I enjoyed the process of making something with my hands. I will likely return to it because it balances my screen-focused work.

e.p: Would you recommend your hobby to others?
e.m: Đưa ra đề xuất có/không, giải thích lý do và điều kiện ai nên thử nó.
e.h: I would/wouldn't recommend + V-ing; because + reason; If + someone + likes, they should + V-inf.
e.s: I would recommend cycling because it's healthy and allows you to explore places at your own pace. If someone likes outdoor exercise, they should try it as it's affordable and enjoyable. However, if they prefer calm indoor activities, cycling may not be the best fit. I think trying different hobbies is better than sticking to one without exploring.

e.p: What do you usually do on weekends?
e.m: Mô tả thói quen cuối tuần của bạn gồm 2 hoạt động chính và lý do bạn chọn chúng.
e.h: I usually + V and + V; because + reason; When + clause.
e.s: I usually catch up on sleep and go for a long walk in the park because both activities help me relax. When I have errands, I try to finish them early so the rest of the weekend feels free. Although I sometimes work on side projects, I prefer to rest more. That balance helps me start the week refreshed.

e.p: Do you plan your weekend in advance?
e.m: Nói bạn có lập kế hoạch không, nêu lợi ích của việc lên kế hoạch và một ví dụ.
e.h: I usually/don't usually plan; It helps + V; For example + clause.
e.s: I usually plan loosely so I have both structure and flexibility. It helps me ensure important tasks are done while leaving time for relaxation. For example, I schedule one social activity and one personal project each weekend. Although spontaneous plans are fun, planning prevents wasted time.

e.p: When do you meet friends during the weekend?
e.m: Nói thời điểm bạn thường gặp bạn bè và lý do bạn chọn thời điểm đó.
e.h: I meet friends + time (e.g., in the afternoon/evenings); because + reason; which + relative clause.
e.s: I meet friends in the afternoon because evenings are often reserved for family or rest. Afternoon meetups are convenient and less crowded, which makes conversation easier. When the weather is nice, we prefer outdoor cafés which are quieter than downtown spots. I find this schedule works better for most of us.

e.p: Do you work on weekends?
e.m: Trả lời có/không, nêu loại công việc nếu có và cách bạn cân bằng với thời gian nghỉ.
e.h: Sometimes/No, I + V; I try to + V to balance; If + busy, I + V.
e.s: Sometimes I work on weekends if a deadline approaches, but I try to limit it to essential tasks. I balance this by scheduling rest and social time so the weekend doesn't feel consumed by work. If I'm very busy, I communicate with my team to avoid last-minute changes. Although occasional work is unavoidable, I prefer to keep weekends mostly free.

e.p: Would you rather relax at home or go out on weekends?
e.m: So sánh hai lựa chọn, nêu quan điểm của bạn và ví dụ tình huống bạn chọn mỗi phương án.
e.h: I prefer + option + because + reason; In situations like + example, I would + V.
e.s: I prefer relaxing at home most weekends because it's restorative and quiet. In situations like birthdays or special events, I would go out to celebrate with others. Although going out can be exciting, staying in helps me recharge after a busy week. I think mixing both depending on the occasion works best.

e.p: How do you make new friends?
e.m: Mô tả cách bạn kết bạn mới và nêu lý do phương pháp đó hiệu quả.
e.h: I meet people by + V-ing; I try to + V; because + reason.
e.s: I make new friends by joining clubs and attending events where people share interests. I try to start small conversations and ask about their hobbies because common ground makes connections easier. When someone is open and kind, friendships develop naturally. I think taking initiative is better than waiting for others to approach.

e.p: What qualities do you value in a friend?
e.m: Liệt kê 2–3 phẩm chất bạn trân trọng và giải thích vì sao.
e.h: I value + noun(s) such as + honesty/kindness; because + reason; which + relative clause.
e.s: I value honesty and kindness in friends because trust and support matter most to me. A friend who listens without judgment is someone I can rely on during hard times. Although sense of humor is nice, reliability is more important in close relationships. I believe these qualities make friendships last longer.

e.p: Do you keep in touch with old friends?
e.m: Nói về việc bạn giữ liên lạc hay không, nêu phương pháp và tần suất, kèm lý do.
e.h: I keep in touch by + method; I contact them + frequency; because + reason.
e.s: I keep in touch by messaging and occasional calls, and I try to reach out every few weeks. When possible, we meet once every few months which helps maintain our bond. Although it's harder as life gets busy, small regular contact keeps relationships alive. I feel it's better to check in frequently, even briefly.

e.p: Have you ever had a disagreement with a friend? How did you handle it?
e.m: Kể một cách ngắn bạn xử lý mâu thuẫn với bạn bè, nêu hành động và kết quả.
e.h: I had a disagreement about + topic; I explained/ listened + because + reason; So + result.
e.s: I once had a disagreement with a friend about work boundaries, so I explained my perspective and listened to theirs. Although we were both upset, communicating calmly helped us find common ground. We agreed on clearer expectations which improved our relationship. I believe honest conversation is more effective than avoiding the issue.

e.p: What makes a friendship last?
e.m: Nêu quan điểm của bạn về yếu tố giữ gìn tình bạn và đưa lý do cụ thể.
e.h: Trust/communication + which + relative clause; because + reason; so + conclusion.
e.s: Trust and good communication are what make friendships last, which help resolve conflicts quickly. When both people are willing to forgive and support each other, the bond strengthens over time. Although shared interests help, respect and honesty matter more in the long run. Therefore I invest effort in being reliable and understanding.

e.p: What's your typical weekday schedule?
e.m: Mô tả lịch mẫu của bạn trong ngày làm việc gồm 3 hoạt động chính và thời gian tương đối.
e.h: I usually + V (morning); In the afternoon I + V; In the evening I + V.
e.s: I usually start my day with a short run in the morning and then work until lunchtime. In the afternoon I attend meetings and focus on project tasks. In the evening I cook dinner and review my plan for the next day. Although each day varies, keeping this routine helps me stay productive.

e.p: How do you manage work and study at the same time?
e.m: Giải thích cách bạn sắp xếp thời gian, ưu tiên và một mẹo để giữ hiệu quả.
e.h: I prioritize + tasks; I allocate + time blocks; If + conflict, I + V-inf.
e.s: I prioritize urgent and important tasks and allocate specific time blocks for study and work. If deadlines overlap, I communicate with supervisors and adjust expectations. When I stick to a schedule, productivity improves and stress decreases. I find short focused sessions better than long unfocused ones.

e.p: When do you feel most productive during the day?
e.m: Nói khoảng thời gian bạn làm việc hiệu quả nhất và giải thích tại sao.
e.h: I feel most productive + time; because + reason; which + result.
e.s: I feel most productive in the morning when my mind is fresh because I can focus better on complex tasks. This peak period allows me to complete important items early, which reduces stress later. Although I can work in the evening, morning productivity usually yields better quality. So I plan critical work for that time.

e.p: Do you take breaks during work? How often?
e.m: Mô tả thói quen nghỉ ngắn, tần suất và lợi ích bạn nhận được.
e.h: I take short breaks every + time (e.g., hour); I + V during breaks; because + benefit.
e.s: I take short breaks every hour to stretch and rest my eyes, which prevents fatigue. During breaks I make tea or do quick stretches to refresh myself. When I return to work, I feel more focused and efficient. I believe regular breaks are better for sustained productivity than long continuous effort.

e.p: Would you change your current schedule if you could?
e.m: Nêu một điều bạn muốn thay đổi trong lịch trình, lý do và lợi ích mong muốn nếu thay đổi.
e.h: I would like to + change; because + reason; so that + result.
e.s: I would like to have more flexible hours so I can balance personal errands and work more easily. Because rigid schedules sometimes cause stress, flexibility would allow me to be more productive when I'm most focused. If that change happened, I think my overall well-being would improve. Although it's not always possible, it's a goal I value.

e.p: Where do you usually buy groceries?
e.m: Nói nơi bạn mua sắm thường xuyên và một lý do bạn chọn đó.
e.h: I usually buy at + place; because + reason; When + clause.
e.s: I usually buy groceries at the local market because it's fresh and affordable. When I need specialty items, I go to a bigger supermarket which has more variety. Although convenience stores are nearby, they are more expensive. I prefer quality and price balance when choosing where to shop.

e.p: Do you prefer shopping online or in-store?
e.m: Nêu ưu tiên của bạn, so sánh cả hai lựa chọn và nêu tình huống bạn chọn mỗi cách.
e.h: I prefer + online/in-store + because + reason; more/less + than.
e.s: I prefer shopping online for electronics because it's convenient and I can compare prices easily. For fresh food, I prefer in-store shopping since I can choose items personally which is better than guessing online. Although online shopping saves time, in-store visits are more reliable for perishable goods. I decide based on the item and urgency.

e.p: Can you return an item if it doesn't fit?
e.m: Trả lời về chính sách trả hàng cá nhân hoặc quy tắc bạn tuân theo khi mua đồ, kèm điều kiện trả hàng.
e.h: Yes/No + I usually/they allow + returns if + condition; because + reason.
e.s: Yes, most stores allow returns if the item is unused and within the receipt period. I usually check the return policy before buying big items to avoid problems. If something doesn't fit, I exchange it or return it quickly to save time. Although returning is sometimes inconvenient, it's reassuring to know I have options.

e.p: How do you decide whether to buy something expensive?
e.m: Mô tả quy trình ra quyết định khi mua món đồ đắt tiền, nêu tiêu chí và ví dụ.
e.h: I consider + criteria such as + durability/need; If + cost is justified, I will + V; otherwise + refrain.
e.s: I consider durability and necessity when buying expensive items; if the cost is justified by long-term use, I will purchase it. For example, I bought a quality laptop because it supports my work and lasts longer. Although the upfront price was high, the investment paid off. I think buying better items saves money in the long run.

e.p: What's your favorite place in the city?
e.m: Nói tên địa điểm yêu thích, mô tả ngắn tính chất và lý do bạn thích nó.
e.h: My favorite place is + place; It is + description; because + reason.
e.s: My favorite place is the riverside park because it's peaceful and green. It has a small café which serves good coffee and a path for walking. When I need to think clearly, I go there which helps me relax. I prefer it more than crowded malls for quiet time.

e.p: Why do you like that place more than others?
e.m: So sánh địa điểm yêu thích với một nơi khác và nêu lý do cụ thể.
e.h: It's more + adj + than + place; because + reason; which + result.
e.s: It's more relaxing than downtown areas because there is less noise and more nature. The fresh air and open space allow me to think clearly, which improves my mood. Although other spots are convenient, this place helps me recharge better. I often invite friends who appreciate calm settings.

e.p: When do you usually go there?
e.m: Nói thời gian bạn thường tới đó và mô tả hoạt động bạn làm ở đó.
e.h: I usually go + time (e.g., on weekends/early morning); I + V there; When + clause.
e.s: I usually go on weekends in the morning to enjoy a quiet walk before crowds arrive. I often read or plan my week while sitting on a bench and drinking coffee. When friends join, we have picnics and chat for hours. Although it's simple, these visits refresh me for the coming week.

e.p: Would you recommend visitors to go there?
e.m: Nêu lời khuyên cho khách tham quan, nêu lợi ích và điều kiện phù hợp để họ đến thăm.
e.h: I would recommend + place for + reason; If + visitor likes + preference, they should + V-inf.
e.s: I would recommend the park to visitors who enjoy nature and quiet spots because it's a pleasant escape from city noise. If a visitor likes photography or peaceful walks, they should definitely visit in the morning. However, during festivals it can be busier than usual. I think it's a must-see for those seeking relaxation.

e.p: Is it expensive to visit that place?
e.m: Trả lời về chi phí tham quan, giải thích chi phí chính và cách tiết kiệm khi đến thăm.
e.h: It's + adj (cheap/expensive); main cost is + noun; You can save by + V-ing.
e.s: It's quite inexpensive to visit since entry is free and you only pay for optional items like café drinks. The main cost would be transport if you live far away, but it's affordable by public transit. If you bring a picnic, you can save money and enjoy more. I think it's a budget-friendly option compared to tourist attractions.

e.p: Can you join a day trip next Saturday?
e.m: Trả lời có/không, đưa ra lý do và đề xuất phương án thay thế nếu bạn không thể tham gia.
e.h: Yes/No + I can/can't because + reason; If not, I suggest + alternative.
e.s: I can't join next Saturday because I have a work commitment, but I appreciate the invitation. If it's possible, I suggest going the following weekend when I'm free. When the schedule is fixed, I can confirm immediately. Although I miss this time, rescheduling works better for me.

e.p: What should we pack for a short trip?
e.m: Liệt kê 3–4 đồ cần mang theo và giải thích ngắn lý do cho mỗi món.
e.h: Pack: + item + because + reason; Also + item for + purpose.
e.s: Pack comfortable shoes because we'll walk a lot, a light jacket in case it gets chilly, and a power bank for phones. Also bring water and snacks to stay hydrated and energized during the day. When you travel light, it's easier to move around. I believe planning supplies is better than improvising.

e.p: Who will drive and how will we split costs?
e.m: Đề xuất ai nên lái xe và cách chia chi phí hợp lý, nêu lý do lựa chọn đó.
e.h: Let's have + person drive because + reason; We can split costs by + method.
e.s: Let's have Mark drive because he has a larger car and is comfortable with long drives. We can split fuel and tolls equally by dividing total costs among passengers. If someone prefers not to drive, they can contribute a bit more to show appreciation. Although splitting may seem complex, fairness is important.

e.p: If it rains, what's our backup plan?
e.m: Đưa ra kế hoạch dự phòng cụ thể khi trời mưa và nêu lý do vì sao phương án đó tốt.
e.h: If + rain, we will + V; because + reason; Alternatively + suggestion.
e.s: If it rains, we will visit a nearby museum or café instead because indoor activities are still enjoyable. Alternatively, we can postpone outdoor parts and focus on a cozy lunch which keeps the trip pleasant. When plans change, flexibility helps everyone stay positive. I think having a clear backup is better than cancelling last minute.

e.p: How do you start your morning?
e.m: Mô tả 2–3 thói quen buổi sáng của bạn và giải thích lợi ích của chúng.
e.h: I start with + V; It helps me + V; When + clause.
e.s: I start my morning with stretching and a healthy breakfast which helps me feel energized. When I plan my top tasks early, I accomplish more during the day. Although mornings are busy, a short routine improves focus. I think a calm start is better than rushing.

e.p: Do you use any apps to organize your day?
e.m: Nói tên loại ứng dụng bạn dùng (không cần tên cụ thể), cách bạn dùng nó và lợi ích.
e.h: I use apps for + purpose; I schedule + tasks; because + benefit.
e.s: I use productivity apps for scheduling and reminders; I block time for key tasks which keeps me on track. When I set deadlines in the app, I'm less likely to forget small but important duties. Although digital tools can't solve everything, they support my routine. I find them more reliable than memory alone.

e.p: When do you usually relax during the day?
e.m: Cho biết thời điểm nghỉ ngơi chính trong ngày và hoạt động bạn làm để thư giãn.
e.h: I relax + time (e.g., in the evening); I usually + V; because + reason.
e.s: I relax in the evening by reading or listening to music because it helps me unwind after work. When possible, I take a short walk before dinner which clears my mind. Although I sometimes work late, I try to keep evenings peaceful. I believe small daily relaxations prevent burnout.

e.p: Would you work late nights often?
e.m: Nêu quan điểm về làm khuya, lý do bạn đồng ý hoặc từ chối và điều kiện bạn sẵn sàng làm việc khuya.
e.h: I would/wouldn't often + V at night; If + urgent, I will + V; because + reason.
e.s: I wouldn't often work late nights because consistent rest is important for health and productivity. If an urgent deadline appears, I will work late occasionally to meet it. Although late work can be effective short-term, it shouldn't become a habit. I prefer planning to avoid frequent late nights.

e.p: How do you end your day productively?
e.m: Mô tả 2 bước bạn làm để kết thúc ngày hiệu quả và lợi ích của chúng.
e.h: I finish by + V (e.g., reviewing tasks) and + V (e.g., planning); which + result.
e.s: I finish the day by reviewing completed tasks and planning the top three priorities for tomorrow which reduces morning stress. When I prepare the night before, I can start the next day with clarity. Although evenings are for rest, a short planning session improves focus. I find this habit more helpful than last-minute scrambling.

e.p: What skills are you good at?
e.m: Liệt kê 2 kỹ năng mạnh của bạn và nêu ví dụ cụ thể cho mỗi kỹ năng.
e.h: I am good at + skill; For example + clause; which + result.
e.s: I am good at communication and time management. For example, clear emails and meetings helped my team finish projects on time. When I manage time well, stress decreases and efficiency improves. I believe these skills are more valuable than technical knowledge alone in many roles.

e.p: Would you like to learn a new language?
e.m: Nói bạn có muốn học ngôn ngữ mới không, nêu ngôn ngữ, lý do và phương pháp bạn sẽ dùng.
e.h: I would like to learn + language because + reason; I will + method (e.g., classes/immersion).
e.s: I would like to learn Spanish because it's widely spoken and useful for travel. I plan to take classes and practice with native speakers when possible. If I have time, immersion through travel would help me learn faster. Although self-study works, guided practice accelerates progress.

e.p: How do you improve a skill you are weak at?
e.m: Mô tả bước bạn sẽ làm để cải thiện một kỹ năng yếu, gồm ít nhất 3 bước cụ thể.
e.h: I assess + weakness; then I + V (practice/study); I get feedback + from + person.
e.s: I assess the weakness by identifying specific gaps and then practice targeted exercises regularly. I also seek feedback from colleagues or mentors to correct mistakes. When progress is slow, I adjust the plan and set smaller milestones. Although improvement takes time, consistent effort leads to steady gains.

e.p: Would you rather become an expert in one skill or know many skills?
e.m: Trình bày quan điểm cá nhân, so sánh hai lựa chọn và nêu lý do cụ thể.
e.h: I prefer + option + because + reason; more/less + than + other option; so + conclusion.
e.s: I prefer becoming proficient in a few key skills rather than being average at many because depth often leads to greater impact. It's better to be an expert in critical areas than to spread attention too thin. Although having diverse abilities can open doors, specialization often results in better career opportunities. So I focus on depth with some supplementary skills.

e.p: If you could choose any skill to master instantly, what would it be?
e.m: Chọn một kỹ năng muốn thành thạo ngay lập tức và giải thích tại sao bạn chọn nó và cách bạn sẽ dùng nó.
e.h: I would choose + skill; because + reason; I would use it to + V.
e.s: If I could master any skill instantly, I would choose public speaking because it opens many professional and personal opportunities. I would use it to lead presentations confidently and inspire teams. When people speak well, they can share ideas more effectively which creates influence. Although practice helps, instant mastery would save years of effort.

d.t: Cảm xúc và quản lý stress

e.p: How do you handle stress at work?
e.m: Mô tả 2 phương pháp bạn dùng để quản lý căng thẳng và lý do chúng hiệu quả.
e.h: I manage stress by + V-ing and + V-ing; because + reason; which + benefit.
e.s: I manage stress by taking short breaks and prioritizing tasks, which prevents overwhelm. When tensions rise, I do brief breathing exercises to calm my mind. Although deadlines cause pressure, these methods keep me focused and productive. I think small daily practices are better than rare big fixes.

e.p: Do you share your feelings with others when you're stressed?
e.m: Nói bạn có hay chia sẻ cảm xúc không, ai bạn tin tưởng và nêu lợi ích của việc chia sẻ.
e.h: I usually + V (share/don't share); I talk to + person; because + benefit.
e.s: I usually share my feelings with close friends or family because they understand and offer support. When I explain the situation, I often get useful advice or a new perspective. Although some people prefer to cope alone, talking helps me process emotions faster. I believe sharing reduces stress more than bottling it up.

e.p: What do you do when you feel overwhelmed?
e.m: Kể 2–3 hành động cụ thể bạn làm khi quá tải và nêu điều kiện bạn thực hiện từng hành động.
e.h: I + V (e.g., step back), then + V; If + severe, I + V (seek help).
e.s: When I feel overwhelmed, I step back and break tasks into smaller parts which makes them manageable. I also prioritize urgent items and postpone less important ones. If stress becomes severe, I talk to a mentor or professional for guidance. Although it's hard to ask for help, it often leads to better solutions.

e.p: Are there activities that reduce your anxiety?
e.m: Liệt kê hoạt động giúp bạn giảm lo âu và giải thích bằng một câu ngắn vì sao chúng hiệu quả.
e.h: Activities: + noun(s) (e.g., exercise, meditation); They help because + reason.
e.s: Regular exercise and short meditation sessions reduce my anxiety because they calm my body and mind. When I exercise, endorphins lift my mood and improve focus. Although results aren't immediate, consistency brings noticeable benefits. I find these practices more reliable than distractions alone.

e.p: Although work is stressful, how do you stay positive?
e.m: Trả lời cách bạn duy trì thái độ tích cực, nêu lý do và một ví dụ cụ thể.
e.h: I stay positive by + V-ing because + reason; For example + clause.
e.s: I stay positive by focusing on small wins and celebrating progress because it builds momentum. For example, finishing a difficult task gives me confidence to tackle the next one. When I acknowledge achievements, motivation improves even during stressful periods. I believe this mindset is better than dwelling on negatives.

e.p: Would you rather live in the city or countryside?
e.m: Chọn một trong hai và giải thích bằng 2–3 lý do, dùng cấu trúc so sánh (more ... than / better).
e.h: I prefer + place + because + reason; more/less + than + other place.
e.s: I prefer living in the city because it's more convenient than the countryside for work and social life. The city offers better public transport and more job opportunities which suit my lifestyle. Although the countryside is quieter and greener, city life fits my current priorities better. I think flexibility and access to services are more important now.

e.p: Is traveling by train better than by plane for you?
e.m: So sánh hai phương tiện, nêu ưu nhược điểm và quan điểm cuối cùng của bạn.
e.h: Train is + advantage because + reason; Plane is + advantage; However + conclusion.
e.s: Traveling by train is more relaxing because you can move around and enjoy scenery, while flying is faster for long distances. Plane travel saves time which is important for business trips, however trains are better for comfort and lower stress. Although speed matters sometimes, I often choose the train for daytime trips. I decide based on distance and urgency.

e.p: Which is more important: salary or job satisfaction?
e.m: Trình bày quan điểm cá nhân, so sánh hai yếu tố và nêu ví dụ minh họa.
e.h: I think + factor is more important because + reason; For example + clause.
e.s: I think job satisfaction is more important in the long term because it affects mental health and motivation. For example, a well-paid job without meaning can lead to burnout sooner than a fulfilling role with moderate pay. Although salary matters for living standards, motivation and purpose influence daily happiness more. So I prioritize meaningful work while ensuring fair compensation.

e.p: Do you prefer working remotely or in the office?
e.m: Nêu sở thích của bạn, so sánh và nói điều kiện bạn sẵn sàng thay đổi lựa chọn.
e.h: I prefer + remote/office because + reason; If + condition, I will + change.
e.s: I prefer remote work because it offers flexibility and saves commuting time which improves work-life balance. However, I enjoy office days for collaboration and social connection. If the job required daily team interaction, I would change to office work for better teamwork. Although remote work fits me now, a hybrid model is ideal.

e.p: Which is better: to save money or to invest it?
e.m: Nêu quan điểm của bạn, giải thích khi nào việc tiết kiệm tốt hơn và khi nào nên đầu tư.
e.h: Saving is good when + condition; Investing is better when + condition; so + advice.
e.s: Saving is good when you need an emergency fund or short-term goals, while investing is better for long-term growth and beating inflation. For example, keeping three months' expenses saved is wiser than investing all money immediately. Although investing has higher potential returns, it carries risks that require planning. So I recommend a balance: save first, then invest surplus wisely.

e.p: Why should we choose this restaurant?
e.m: Đưa ít nhất hai lý do thuyết phục để chọn nhà hàng và kết luận ngắn.
e.h: We should choose it because + reason; It also + benefit; Therefore + conclusion.
e.s: We should choose this restaurant because it offers a varied menu and a quiet atmosphere. It also has good reviews for fast service which suits our schedule. Although it's slightly more expensive, the quality makes it worth the price. Therefore I recommend it for our group dinner.

e.p: I think we should postpone the meeting. What do you suggest?
e.m: Đưa ra đề xuất của bạn (đồng ý hoặc không), nêu lý do và thời điểm mới nếu hoãn.
e.h: I agree/disagree because + reason; If postpone, let's choose + new time.
e.s: I agree that postponing could help if key members are unavailable because decisions need full input. If we postpone, let's reschedule for next Tuesday morning when everyone can attend. When all stakeholders join, the meeting will be more productive. Although delays are inconvenient, better attendance leads to better outcomes.

e.p: What is your opinion about introducing flexible working hours?
e.m: Nêu quan điểm cá nhân, đưa ra 2 lợi ích và một mối lo ngại, kết luận bằng đề xuất.
e.h: I support/oppose + because + benefits; However + concern; So + suggestion.
e.s: I support introducing flexible working hours because it improves work-life balance and can boost productivity. However, my concern is ensuring team coordination to avoid missed communications. If flex hours are implemented, clear core hours and communication rules should be set. I believe this approach balances freedom with team needs.

e.p: Could you propose a simple plan to improve team morale?
e.m: Đưa ra kế hoạch 3 bước ngắn để nâng cao tinh thần đội nhóm và giải thích vì sao mỗi bước hữu ích.
e.h: Steps: 1) + action; 2) + action; 3) + action; because + benefit each.
e.s: Step 1: organize monthly casual meetups to build camaraderie and reduce stress. Step 2: recognize small achievements publicly because appreciation motivates people. Step 3: create opportunities for skill-sharing which increases engagement and learning. When combined, these steps improve morale more than one-off events. I think consistent actions yield lasting results.

e.p: Although costs are high, why invest in training?
e.m: Giải thích tại sao đáng đầu tư cho đào tạo, nêu 2 lý do và kết luận ngắn.
e.h: Training brings + benefit; For example + clause; So + conclusion.
e.s: Training brings higher productivity and better retention, for example by equipping staff with efficient methods that save time. Although costs are high initially, upskilling employees reduces long-term errors and turnover expenses. When teams feel supported, engagement improves which benefits the company. So investing in training is worthwhile despite the short-term expense.

e.p: Where do you see yourself in five years?
e.m: Miêu tả mục tiêu nghề nghiệp hoặc cuộc sống trong 5 năm, nêu lý do và bước bạn sẽ làm để đạt được.
e.h: In five years I hope to + V; I will + steps such as + V; because + reason.
e.s: In five years I hope to be leading a small team in my field because I enjoy mentoring others. I will gain relevant experience and take leadership courses to prepare for this role. When I reach that point, I want to balance work with personal life more effectively. Although the path requires effort, clear steps make it achievable.

e.p: Would you consider moving abroad for work?
e.m: Trả lời có/không, nêu điều kiện bạn sẽ đồng ý và lợi ích bạn mong đợi.
e.h: I would consider + moving if + condition; because + benefit; However + concern.
e.s: I would consider moving abroad if the opportunity offers career growth and learning because international experience is valuable. However, I would ensure my family situation is stable before deciding. If the timing aligns with personal commitments, I think the benefits outweigh challenges. I believe such a move is better when well planned.

e.p: When do you plan to start a new project or hobby in the future?
e.m: Nêu dự định sắp tới cho dự án hoặc sở thích mới, thời gian bắt đầu và lý do bạn chọn thời điểm đó.
e.h: I plan to start + project/hobby + time; because + reason; When + condition.
e.s: I plan to start learning photography next month because I have fewer work commitments then. When I have more free time, I can practice consistently which accelerates progress. Although it's tempting to begin immediately, waiting until I can commit regularly seems wiser. I expect steady improvement with focused practice.

e.p: Do you have a backup plan if your main goal fails?
e.m: Trình bày ngắn kế hoạch dự phòng, lý do cần có phương án B và một ví dụ cụ thể.
e.h: I have a backup plan which + action; because + reason; For example + clause.
e.s: I have a backup plan which involves shifting focus to related roles while continuing to build skills because flexibility reduces risk. For example, if a startup role doesn't work out, I would seek a similar position in a more established company. Although failure is disappointing, having alternatives keeps momentum. I think planning ahead is better than leaving outcomes to chance.

e.p: How will you balance personal life and career goals in the future?
e.m: Nêu 2–3 nguyên tắc bạn sẽ theo để cân bằng và giải thích tại sao chúng hiệu quả.
e.h: Principles: set boundaries; schedule family time; prioritize health; because + reason.
e.s: I will set clear work boundaries, schedule regular family time, and prioritize health because these principles maintain energy and relationships. When work becomes demanding, boundaries help prevent burnout and scheduling ensures important moments are not missed. Although balancing is challenging, consistent habits keep priorities aligned. I believe deliberate choices lead to sustainable success.
